reviews.review_description:
My wife loves these quick workouts. We both were quite skeptical before we got the app, since she’s done real pilates before. But it has great workouts! Lots of them do feel like yoga though but all okay as she is happy :)

Workout has become interesting for her

developer_response.body:
We're so glad your wife is enjoying the app. Thank you for the feedback!

Joyce
Litesport

reviews.review_description:
This app has extreme potential. I purchased it but it will only allow me to view the 1st into video. When I click on the other videos it acts like it will load but lads back on the selection screen.

I'm so disappointed.
I searched high and low to be able to fast-forward the video. Apparently, that is not provided.

developer_response.body:
Unfortunately, there is no scrolling forward or backward in the workout videos. There are technical difficulties getting this functionality to work correctly. The audio and video end up being out of sync, so it is not supported.
 
Thank you.

Joyce
Litesport

reviews.review_description: Love this App. The workouts are quick, easy and effective.

developer_response.body:
We're so glad you're enjoying Litesport!

Joyce
Litesport

reviews.review_description: I was skeptical because I don't love mat pilates but due $15 - why not? I love the UI - the instructor is always in front of you - you never lose sight. That is a game changer for an app. Easy to use and follow with modifications.

developer_response.body:
We're so happy that you are enjoying the application!

Joyce
Litesport

reviews.review_description: i really wish there was a way to fast forward through  certain parts.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback. Fast forward has been problematic when we've tried implementing it in the past.

reviews.review_title: Love it as a Newbie to Pilates
reviews.review_description: Completely new to pilates and gave it a go with Club Pilates.  Absolutely love it and that's purely down to this app.  Started pilates due to getting lower back pain and it's disappeared after only a few sessions.  I find some of the workouts to be absolutely fab and would love a way to favourite them or mark them so I know which one it was.  Trying to do the hundred for instance is a killer but I've no idea what workout it was that had that exercise in it.  Also, might be nice to see what level some of the workouts are aimed at.  The 20 minute core I've just done was on a different level to all the other workouts I've done (4+ months now). Anyway - LOVE IT!

developer_response.body:
We're so glad you are enjoying the app and that it's helped with your lower back pain! Thank you for the feedback and for taking the time to leave a review.

Joyce
Litesport

reviews.review_description: I’m new to Pilates and wasn’t sure how effective a VR workout could really be — but that doubt disappeared fast. I just finished a 20-minute core session with Brittany, and it was tough in the best way. It pushed my core strength and reminded me how much flexibility I need to build! There’s a lot for me to work on, but I’m genuinely excited to keep going. Absolutely love this app — it’s already become part of my routine.

Kind of bummed my old X+ subscription can’t be used anymore. I liked to do workouts from all the clubs and through the X+ on my iPad. I used to go to Club Pilates regularly and like to be able to do the workouts at home when I can’t  make class. 

Would love to see some reformer classes offered. I am a fan of being able to see the instructor from all angles. This is a huge plus, even over being in an in person class. 

Hopefully more classes are offered.

I'm new to Pilates and this program allows me to learn with my virtual instructor all around me. It seems really good for a beginner and would assume someone who is more advanced as the instructors talk about how to do each move and how to make it more difficult for those who's body's may be more flexible then mine. Each of the classes are broken down into short time frames (10, 15, 20 mins) and are much easier for me to accomplish.

reviews.review_title: Love this, pls bring more longer session
reviews.review_description:
This is so well designed, no matter how you turn, the pilates coach is in front of you, even on the mat when planking. Hoping for more sessions soon, done 40 of the 63 already so lots of fun for the very reasonable price. 

And update, they dropped a bunch more, so over 90 workouts. Still have not played through all, this is so good value for money too.

I wish there was a way to filter better on the different focuses eg whole body, core etc because that is faulty, doesnt show all in the category, seems like not all workouts are mapped correctly.

Update again, played all session, yay go me! So, startimg again it is really cumbersome to play through again and find the right one to play. I go to the activity, started back in the history but have to go back and forth to where I was last time in the current month. i wish there was a way to filter or sort all workouts better or that each workout has the info what date played, on the work out card, not under activity by month.

Dear developers, will you bring yogasix to meta?

Really cool experience. The interface is very intuitive and I am able to follow along no matter what pose I am doing sinc instructor pops right into view.   Just having the clear environment all around you makes the workout much more engaging too. Also that it is subscription free is a huge bonus.
I got this bundle and I really enjoy it.  New to spin and it is a good way to work up to riding with a group if wanted.  I love all in the bundle.

I have been using Club Pilates for the past month. I have done, primarily, the 20 minute full body classes and 20 minute core classes. I've been trying to do the classes every day but have  managed to have completed 25.  My range of motion is much more expansive, and I have greater strength and flexibility. I cannot recommend it high enough. The classes are definitely challenging but modifications are provided if you need the assist! Great trainers, great visuals, just a great app.
I love this app however, I do not see any new Pilates classes since August 2024. Is this normal?

reviews.review_title: Love the app, needs minor adjustments.
reviews.review_description:
Love the app. Would love it more if I could choose fully vr mode. Also, some of the instructors are wearing black pants/socks and work out on a black mat. This makes it really difficult for me to see what they are doing with their feet/legs. 

Would also love it if the thumbnail of the workout would include the accessoires needed. Now I have to click first and then see if I’m able to proceed with that workout.

reviews.review_title: Just like Yoga not Pialtes on aREFORMER
reviews.review_description: Not good

Tremendous graphics, great workouts, why the stupid glitches? Lately, the only way to "fix" is to quit and restart. 

But how to quit? THERE'S NO QUIT OPTION ON THE MENUS!!! Shouldn't take a computer scientist to exit and restart the app, but there it is.

developer_response.body:
Hello GlowingSiamese2370,

Thank you for leaving your review on your experience with Club Pilates; we're sorry to hear you were experiencing some glitches—we would love to find out more about your experience. 

Please reach out to our team via the request form below so we can find out more details and figure out a solution: 

https://support.litesport.com/hc/en-us/requests/new

You should always be able to press and hold the oculus button to exit from any app if needed.

Thanks again for trying out Club Pilates and taking the time to leave your feedback!

reviews.review_description: I received a Meta quest 3S for Christmas and I wanted to start taking fitness classes at home. This app is challenging but great for beginners like me. My core is getting stronger and my body is feeling great! Worth the money!

reviews.review_title: Loads of options with great instructors
reviews.review_description: As my gym doesn't offer Pilates anymore, this was a great alternative. I can do it any day I want, as much as I want in the comfort of my own home. There's loads of different options to choose from ranging from 10 minutes to 30 minutes. And I love the fact no matter where I'm facing, I can see the instructor, so brilliant!

I have done reformer pilates for decades but did not know what to expect in VR with no machine.

The multiple views of the trainer is a fantastic idea.

Quality and quantity are good.

My only concern is bandwidth. I struggle with this in my area and whilst I can live with an app being online loading every lesson every time would be a challenge.

Hey Devs is the case or are lessons cached :)

Club Pilates is an excellent tool for those who suffer from joint stiffness. It offers a variety of workouts tailored to individual needs, making it a versatile choice for users.


---

✅ 

There are several training options based on your personal requirements.

The hand tracking system works well.

I use it alongside StretchLab, which is more focused on stretching.



---

🔧 Possible Improvements: Suggestions for Developers

Add exercises to improve posture and balance. These would make the program even more comprehensive.

Include real-time feedback from the instructor. Ensure the instructor can point out incorrect movements. This feature shouldn’t be mandatory but should help users understand if they’re performing the exercises correctly and making progress.


These suggestions also apply to StretchLab!

I love that I can see the instructor no matter which direction I'm looking. No more breaking my neck trying to see what the instructor's doing!  You can't beat the price if you consider how much it would cost to go into a studio and take this many classes.  I'm super happy with this purchase!
Too improve the app:
 -Remove the dates on workout choices, it doesn't make sense and is confusing.
-Breathing guide like in Stretch Lab. It helps to remind us to breathe through exercises and not hold our breath.
-List of items needed like yoga blocks, straps, stretching straps, bands, light weights and pilates ball (I think I've listed everything)

developer_response.body:
Hello nahli.marie, 

Thanks so much for taking time to leave your review! We really appreciate it and are so glad to hear you enjoyed Club Pilates. We will let our team know your great recommendations, but also wanted to let you know, regarding workout items, you can see all the equipment needed for the workout after you select a class on the details page. 

If you have any other questions, concerns or comments, please don't hesitate to reach out to our team here: https://support.litesport.com/hc/en-us/requests/new

Thanks again!

reviews.review_description: It is so much better than trying to follow a fitness video.  The instructors are right there in your room. It is short sessions with various moves like planks etc.  Everything is clear and easy to follow and can feel it working with just a 10 min session. Great!

Club Pilates has become my favorite workout App. I am 63 and feeling my age. Some of the workouts are challenging but it feels as if the trainers are right there and they do give alternatives for those of us struggling. Best of all, I can do my workout when it suits me. I had a problem with some exercise modules not loading. I sent a message to Litesport. They responded promptly and I am delighted that the problem was sorted. I have purchased Stretch  Lab as well. Club Pilates however is number one in my list!

reviews.review_title: Perfect but please make the trainers 3D!
reviews.review_description: I bought Stretchlab first and i love it. Club Pilates is even better. I also adore, that you can see the trainer in every direction during your pose. No other fitness app has that, perfect for your self-control! Highly recommended and when the trainers will be in 3D, this will be like God-Mode! :)

reviews.review_title: Nice. But no Resistance band exercise?
reviews.review_description: Added to my favorite.  Very good. Pl add resistance band exercise.  I don't see it. Is it already there?

developer_response.body:
There are a few workouts that use resistance bands. To find them, click on the "All Classes" tab, then select the "Filters" link located above the workouts on the left. Currently, there are three workouts available that utilize resistance bands.

I hope this information is helpful. Thank you for your feedback!

Best,  
Joyce

reviews.review_description: Had first session with it this morning and feel iv had my money's worth already, great instructions and love the way the instructor moves around the room so that you can see them whatever position you are in! Not alot of workouts and the max is 30 mins Hopefully will add more content in time!!

I feel like I have a personal trainer who is there everywhere I look. Thus even  better than a real life personal trainer as I don’t have to twist my body in order to see what the trainer is doing. 

Love it.

This is excellent.  I was a little sceptical about whether or not my headset would get in the way.  It didn’t, and not only that, there were suggestions on how to make yourself more comfortable with the headset.  It was great having the choice to choose a mixed reality experience, or be part of the room.  Everything is explained well, and I can see the muscle groups being targeted on the right.  But, by far THE BEST thing about this, is that I can see the instructor if I look up/down/left/right.  I am never left guessing when the movement has been completed, or what movement I should be turning towards next.  This was always the problem with trying to work out with video content on the tv.  I paid full price, and didn’t get this on any promotion - but I feel it has been worth every penny.

Only tried one so far, but someone please tell
Britani that it's EXhale not AXhale. :)
Love that you can see the instructor from any angle.

Giving this the same review as Pure Barre and Stretch Lab......

Very good value for cost...... And stand-alone rather than subscription now! As much as I would like to try some of the big name fitness apps, I will never sign up for a subscription model.

The Xponential series is well designed and the genius is in the multiple positions of the instructor. You will see your instructor in 6 different viewpoints: in front of you, behind you to the left and to the right...... and if you look down or up, they are there too. No more trying to contort to see what you are supposed to be doing!

I have read that there is disappointment in the mixed studio reality that although the studio (top half) shows up in color, the bottom half which is your home environment, is black and white. This is true on the quest 2 (which I am using) but in my opinion, does not take away from the experience. I believe that it is in color on the q3. With the mixed reality, you can easily find your Barre, weights etc without peeking under the bottom of your headset.

The only thing I wish was better is the menu. There are 50 sessions available in the all classes. But, if you add up the classes in the sub menus, it seems that there are much less. If the devs could have all of the classes listed in the sub categories, it would be perfect.

I also purchased the Pure Barre and Stretch Lab and this review will be identical for them. Planning on getting the Rumble Boxing as well..... Unlikely to get the cycling one as I have no plans to get a stationary bike.

The series would be complete if a Yoga one was developed. So devs, if you are listening, please consider Yoga - unless it is already in the works!

Update: Highly recommend Chloe Melina’s 10 minute upper body workout for anyone who sits at a computer a lot. Love all the 10 minute workouts. Even when tired I can talk myself into doing just 10 minutes. 

I’m a member of an in person Club Pilates studio but never go due to class times not working with my schedule or just making myself get out the door. This app is perfect! I can do classes whenever I want. Also I thought I might have to take my battery pack off of my headset to make it work but nope! And I love that you can see the instructors wherever you turn. It’s also a huge bonus that yoga is not mixed in with Pilates. That’s why I bought this app instead of the other one and I couldn’t be more pleased. Love all the instructors and hope to work up to some more intense classes.
I use this app outside and the Quest 3s handles it well.
I'm really getting into this. Great coaches. It's like they're there in the room with you. It's been a few weeks now and I can already see definition as well as strength Improvement.
Lots of classes just don’t load, realy frustrating this

developer_response.body:
Updated Response:
Hello DeusVult_86,

Thank you again for taking time to leave your feedback regarding the issue you experienced loading some of the Club Pilates classes. Our team identified an issue causing some of the workouts not to load that has now been resolved. We apologize for any inconvenience; as of November 18, 2024 at 5:15 pm EST, the issue has been fixed and all workouts should open as expected. Should you have any other questions, concerns, or feedback regarding this fix please don’t hesitate to reach back out to our development team at the link below: 

https://support.litesport.com/hc/en-us/requests/new

Thanks again and enjoy your workouts with Club Pilates!

reviews.review_description: This is the workout app I've been waiting for! I've tried many others, but this one really gives me a full-body workout, not just focusing on my arms. I love how I can do exercises like bridges on the floor and feel the benefits all over. Initially, I was concerned about being able to see the instructor clearly while wearing the headset, but that worry quickly disappeared. No matter the angle, I could see the instructor perfectly—even when I had my head down doing a cat/cow stretch, the instructor’s video appeared between my hands on the mat! I’m excited to try more classes!
Love Love Love!! That was the best Pilates workout. I like that you can see it on the floor while you’re on the floor😄 I will add this to my daily routine.
A plus again,same as the other apps really good.
A bunch of classes to choose from at all fitness levels. I'm really enjoying the workouts.
